ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Category to which the game belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, adventure, puzzle) */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  "minimum_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum system requirements for the game */,
  "recommended_requirements" TEXT /* Recommended system requirements for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game to which the achievement belongs */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Point value of the achievement */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., level completion, collectible, skill-based) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the achievement (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "original_game_id" TEXT /* Original identifier for the game session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game being played */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category for the achievement */,
  "level_id" TEXT /* ID of the level achieved */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the achievement in the user's progress */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time when the achievement was completed */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("original_game_id", "user_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "setting_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game to which the level belongs */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user setting the preference */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id", "preference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user playing the game */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game being played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the leaderboard */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update (e.g., bug fixes, new features) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_analytics" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game related to the analytics data */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., daily active users, average session time) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "metric_name", "timestamp")
)
